species: The steroidal lactone withaferin A (WFA) is a dietary phytochemical, derived from Withania somnifera.
cell_type: we investigated the effect of WFA on T-cell motility...
disease_state: may be exploited to pharmacologically control host immune responses and potentially prevent autoimmune-mediated pathologies.
sample_source: isolated from blood samples collected from healthy volunteers...
cell_line: The human T-cell line HuT78 (ATCC TIB-161TM) was cultured as described previously.
